summary: Fix cookie auth: send the imported cookie jar as the Cookie header and derive X-CSRF-Token + shopid from it.
reason: The generated client wrapped the whole cookie string in a single cookie named "Cookie" (AddCookie{Name:"Cookie"}), which ListingView's backend 401s. Replaced with applyListingViewAuth.
validated_outcome: auth login --chrome + doctor browser-session-proof valid; 91/91 live dogfood.
